title: Bootstrap the /loop 5m orchestrator: QUEUE, heartbeat prompt, memory
question: Does outcomes-mcp now have a queue file, a heartbeat prompt, and an orchestrator memory file that together let any Claude session re-enter the long-running orchestration cleanly?
success_criteria: outcomes QUEUE.md exists with 31 outcomes across tracks A through F
loop heartbeat prompt committed at claude loop-prompt.md is self-contained and re-readable each tick
orchestrator memory file pointed at by MEMORY.md describes the operating model and the no-architecture-by-asking rule

capabilities: queue file tracks 31 outcomes status depends_on runroc
heartbeat prompt picks next pending and advances one atomic step per tick
memory file lets a new session pick up the orchestration without operator briefing
